mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO rpt_aging_analysis ( stat_date, project_id, merchant_id, contract_id, fee_item_id, within_30, days_31_60, days_61_90, days_91_180, days_181_365, over_365, total_outstanding, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at, is_deleted ) VALUES
( #{r.statDate}, #{r.projectId}, #{r.merchantId}, #{r.contractId}, COALESCE(#{r.feeItemId}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.within30}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.days3160}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.days6190}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.days91180}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.days181365}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.over365}, 0), COALESCE(#{r.totalOutstanding}, 0), 0, NOW(), 0, NOW(), 0 )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE within_30 = VALUES(within_30), days_31_60 = VALUES(days_31_60), days_61_90 = VALUES(days_61_90), days_91_180 = VALUES(days_91_180), days_181_365 = VALUES(days_181_365), over_365 = VALUES(over_365), total_outstanding = VALUES(total_outstanding), updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(stat_date) FROM rpt_aging_analysis WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND merchant_id = 0 AND contract_id = 0 AND fee_item_id = 0

SELECT stat_date AS statDate, project_id AS projectId, SUM(within_30) AS within30, SUM(days_31_60) AS days3160, SUM(days_61_90) AS days6190, SUM(days_91_180) AS days91180, SUM(days_181_365) AS days181365, SUM(over_365) AS over365, SUM(total_outstanding) AS totalOutstanding FROM rpt_aging_analysis WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND merchant_id = 0 AND contract_id = 0 AND fee_item_id = 0 AND stat_date = #{statDate}
GROUP BY stat_date, project_id ORDER BY totalOutstanding DESC

SELECT stat_date AS statDate, project_id AS projectId, merchant_id AS merchantId, contract_id AS contractId, within_30 AS within30, days_31_60 AS days3160, days_61_90 AS days6190, days_91_180 AS days91180, days_181_365 AS days181365, over_365 AS over365, total_outstanding AS totalOutstanding FROM rpt_aging_analysis WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND merchant_id != 0 AND contract_id = 0 AND fee_item_id = 0 AND stat_date = #{statDate}
ORDER BY total_outstanding DESC LIMIT #{topN}
